title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Answering Words

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (I won! I can go toe to toe against those two!)

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... I never saw that coming... She beat two
Mejiros...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I can't believe it... I thought for sure one of
those two was going to win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I may have lost today, but next time, the glory's
mine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And I'm sure McQueen feels just the same! I know
she's going to do her best to live up to all your
expectations! And that's not all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen isn't the only runner in the Mejiro
family! And at the Takarazuka Kinen, I, Mejiro
Ryan, will show you that I'm not to be ignored!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah! That's right! I'll always be rooting for you,
Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I don't know if I could've said something like that
after missing out on first place...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Would I have the composure to think about how
my fans are reacting to my performance, and how
to reassure them?)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(...No, there's no way. I wouldn't be able to hide
my disappointment. That's the difference
between Ryan and me.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Those are the words of someone who's lived
shouldering expectations.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: At the Takarazuka Kinen, that's gonna be me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Standing in the winner's circle, Ines Fujin makes
this vow with her hand on her chest.
